name: Governed Artifacts, Conversations, and Memory
objective: Preserve large work products and conversation evidence outside PostgreSQL while keeping lifecycle, provenance, authorization, retention, transcript binding, and durable memory promotion canonical and auditable inside PostgreSQL.
scope: strict artifact bundle, conversation, message, memory candidate, and memory record contracts
Migration 007 PostgreSQL authority for artifact, conversation, message, citation, candidate, and memory lifecycle
content-addressed conditional S3-compatible publication with full-body verification and recovery journaling
reference-safe tombstone and exact ETag plus version physical purge
deterministic canonical conversation transcript bytes and exact source provenance
dedicated authenticated human or configured policy-system memory promotion authority
bounded content-free operational metrics, receipt verification, restore rehearsal, and rollback compatibility
iterative independent review, vulnerability scanning, and two-phase closure evidence
out_of_scope: production object-store provisioning, network policy, and secret distribution
author: codex
independent_validator: CodeRabbit full-range public review, protected GitHub Actions on PostgreSQL 18, and a separate immutable candidate review
